raw_consumer_statement:
Many month ago, I was notified by law enforcement that I had been ( and was ) the victim of idenity and mail fraud/theft. I was then advised to closely review all of my financial accounts. 
Upon reviewing the charges to my Citibank Mastercard, I located the following charges : 1. Merchant Name ( as shown on statement ) : XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX Disputed Amount : {$48.00} Date of Charge : XX/XX/XXXX XXXX. XX/XX/XXXX ( this correspondence specifically noted that XXXX XXXX XXXX was waiting on Citibank to make contact so that it could process my refund ( s ). and there was never any response to same. 
XXXX. XX/XX/XXXX ; XXXX. XX/XX/XXXX ; XXXX. XX/XX/XXXX. 
However, Citibank never acknowledge my dispute of these particular charges. 

As of the date I submit this complaint, Citibank has still failed to ever acknowledge these particular disputes. 

my correspondence, was transmitted via email and was physically delivered by XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX I do have copies of the delivery confirmation. 

Despite transmitting this written correspondence, I never got any response from Citibank. I have spoken with this merchant multiple times and the merchant is ready and wants to refund me but, despite me submitting my disputes and despite my multiple letters, Citibank has NEVER contacted the merchant. 

THE MERCHANT WANTS TO REFUND ME BUT IS WAITING ON CITIBANK and the lawyer for the company just reiterated this to me again. This is very improper and CITIBANK SHOULD BE SANCTIONED
